channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Fly tipping on pavement, 22nd March
item.description:
This furniture is growing by the day. It's now all along swallands road ie on the triangle. It's about time lewisham council done something about this . It's not going to get any better. To stop this it would be a detergent if cctv camera was put up so you the council could prosecute the culprits which in turn would pay for the camera's. I'm sorry to say Bellingham in in a sorry state and I fill sorry for the guys who have to clear is mess up every week .
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Swallands Road, Southend, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Offensive graffiti on fence, 22nd March
item.description:
Offensive graffiti on boundary fence. Please remove it.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bannister Gardens, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 22nd March
item.description:
Outside 95-101 Ravensdale and opposite the houses, black bags of rubbish

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Ravensdale Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dustin’s outside girls school, 22nd March
item.description:
The dustbins have been left on street outside girls school for 3 days, animals are spreading the rubbish all over the street

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Ravensdale Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Two purple sacks, 22nd March
item.description:
Two purple sacks of litter collected by a street friend, left opposite 27 New street Hill

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): New Street Hill, Sundridge, Greater London

item.title: Dead fox, 22nd March
item.description:
Dead fox
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 88, Penhill Road, Blendon, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken tree branch needs to be removed before it falls, 22nd March
item.description:
One of the top, tall branches of this tree was snapped in the recent storm and is now leaning dangerously over the payment and front of the nearest house. This branch needs to be pruned / removed before the next bad weather causes it to fall hurting a passer by or damaging the property.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Clevedon Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead animal, 22nd March
item.description:
Dead Animal on foot path

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Butts Wood Path, Thamesmead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping on corner of Jowett at and Sumner road, 22nd March
item.description:
Hi there, there is a lot of fly tipped rubbish by the cycle storage by Jowlett St park. Please could this be cleared away. Thank you

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sumner Road, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipped rubbish on Haslam St, 22nd March
item.description:
Hi There, There is quite a bit of fly tipped rubbish by the childrens playground on Haslam Street l. Please could this be cleared away. Thank you

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Stopes Street, Peckham, Greater London

item.title: Overhanging trees, 22nd March

item.title: Box and waste outside 116 King George Street for a full week, 22nd March
item.description:
Box and waste outside house for a full week. Looks to Include wastes and household waste. Foxes have got to it and spread on the street. Recycling won’t collect box as full of waste.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): King George Street, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside 70A, 22nd March
item.description:
Delivery trucks have damaged the lower branches of the tree.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 70a, Lady Margaret Road, Tufnell Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Canal full of rubbish SE28 0HP, 22nd March
item.description:
Soon it’s baby duck season, we’ll have a lot of them in the canal but the state of it is not great. I know a lot of people throw rubbish there intentionally but there is not that many bins on the length of the pathway… the ducks that permanently live in the canal are often stuck between rubbish bits

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Anson Place, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The area is being heavily littered. I kindly ask that appropriate measures be taken and warning signs installed to prevent further dumping of rubbish in this area., 22nd March
item.description:
The area is being heavily littered. I kindly ask that appropriate measures be taken and warning signs installed to prevent further dumping of rubbish in this area.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Fieldfare Road, Greater London
